title: circaea mollis
intro: Circaea mollis, also known as the soft-enchanter's-nightshade, is a species of flowering plant in the family Onagraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Circaea mollis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve skin conditions, and boost the immune system. Circaea mollis can be prepared as a herbal remedy in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
